Twitch Bits are actually more expensive to buy on mobile devices, due to Apple and Google's fees. Try purchasing on bits on your PC for a better deal.

Donating or subscribing is not required in the slightest - please only donate if you are financially comfortable.

**Douglas Scott Wreden**[[1]](#cite_note-1) (born January 18, 1991), better known as **DougDoug** (formerly **Gloudas**), is an American YouTuber, Twitch streamer, podcaster, [speedrunner,](/wiki/Speedrunning "Speedrunning")[[2]](#cite_note-2) author, and former *[Hearthstone](/wiki/Hearthstone "Hearthstone")* caster and producer. He makes gaming videos that revolve around him doing various gaming challenges, often involving the use of [artificial intelligence](/wiki/Artificial_intelligence "Artificial intelligence"), [modifications to games](/wiki/Video_game_modding "Video game modding"), and giving his viewers on Twitch heavy control of the game or stream.[[3]](#cite_note-3) He retired his main YouTube channel in late 2025.[[4]](#cite_note-4)

In 2023, he won the "League of Their Own" award at [The Streamer Awards](/wiki/The_Streamer_Awards "The Streamer Awards"), and in 2024, he was nominated for the "Best Software and Game Development" award. In 2025, Wreden began hosting the *[Lemonade Stand](/wiki/Lemonade_Stand_(podcast) "Lemonade Stand (podcast)")* podcast with fellow content creators [Brandon Ewing](/wiki/Atrioc "Atrioc") and Aiden McCaig,[[5]](#cite_note-Carman-5) and released the book *Doug: a DougDoug Story*.[[6]](#cite_note-6)

## Career

### Esports

Wreden worked for [Electronic Arts](/wiki/Electronic_Arts "Electronic Arts") as a programmer before leaving to work on the *[Hearthstone](/wiki/Hearthstone "Hearthstone")* Championship Tour, which was organized by [ESL](/wiki/ESL_(company) "ESL (company)"), under the online alias Gloudas. After ESL stopped producing the Championship Tour in 2017, he helped design the *Hearthstone* Trinity Series for ESL; he later described his role:[[7]](#cite_note-Leslie-7)

> Right around [when ESL stopped producing the Championship Tour], ESL was in talks with Twitch to partner on an original *Hearthstone* team league, and since I had been helping lead ESL's *Hearthstone* team through 2016, I was approached internally to help design what this new team league would be. I definitely will not claim to be the sole creator of Trinity Series, as there were a number of super talented folks who helped iterate on the format and concept, but through a lot of discussion we landed on our core concept: eight teams of three players, with a *[Last Hero Standing](/wiki/Last_Hero_Standing "Last Hero Standing")* nine-deck format, and team listen-ins throughout the matches.

— Wreden, 2018[[7]](#cite_note-Leslie-7)

After the Trinity Series design was finalized, Wreden produced the tournament and described his role as helping "coordinate all the show's elements on a high level". According to Wreden, the tournament's first season was positively received, and a second one was released.[[7]](#cite_note-Leslie-7)

Towards the end of the second Trinity Series season, Reynad – a colleague – convinced Wreden to join [esports](/wiki/Esports "Esports") organization [Tempo Storm](/wiki/Tempo_Storm "Tempo Storm"); he later said he agreed with Reynad's emphasis on creativity and wanted a "change of pace" from ESL.[[7]](#cite_note-Leslie-7) In March 2018, he entered *Hearthstone*'s "So you think you can cast?" competition, which searched for new *Hearthstone* casters. His audition was [retweeted](/wiki/Retweet "Retweet") by *Hearthstone* director [Ben Brode](/wiki/Ben_Brode "Ben Brode"); Tim Clark, writing for *[PC Gamer](/wiki/PC_Gamer "PC Gamer")*, said that he was the "clear winner" and not selecting him would be a "huuuuuuuuuuuge [*[sic](/wiki/Sic "Sic")*] misplay".[[8]](#cite_note-8)

### Streaming

| External videos | |
| --- | --- |
| [video icon](/wiki/File:Nuvola_apps_kaboodle.svg) [Can you drive across GTA 5 if Twitch Chat controls your Mods?](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1CXcKeced3w) | |

Wreden transitioned to being a [Twitch streamer](/wiki/Twitch_streamer "Twitch streamer") and [YouTuber](/wiki/YouTuber "YouTuber") under the name DougDoug, streaming first on March 9, 2019.[[9]](#cite_note-9) He gained media attention in October 2020 after streaming *[Grand Theft Auto 5](/wiki/Grand_Theft_Auto_5 "Grand Theft Auto 5")* on [Twitch](/wiki/Twitch_(service) "Twitch (service)"), where he allowed his viewers to input commands in the Twitch chat that affected the game.[[10]](#cite_note-10) In January 2022, he garnered more media attention after streaming and completing a *[Super Mario Odyssey](/wiki/Super_Mario_Odyssey "Super Mario Odyssey")* "HUD Challenge" [speedrun](/wiki/Speedrun "Speedrun"), wherein compounding [heads-up displays](/wiki/Heads-up_displays "Heads-up displays") (HUDs) appeared on his screen after every five minutes. Although he completed the challenge, he was unable to complete it in under one hour, 11 minutes, and 21 seconds, his personal non-"HUD Challenge" best.[[11]](#cite_note-11)[[12]](#cite_note-12)

#### Philanthropy

See also: [Rosa (sea otter)](/wiki/Rosa_(sea_otter) "Rosa (sea otter)") and [Monterey Bay Aquarium](/wiki/Monterey_Bay_Aquarium "Monterey Bay Aquarium")

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/f/f8/Rosa_10_28_2023_MBA_keeper_cropped.jpg/250px-Rosa_10_28_2023_MBA_keeper_cropped.jpg)](/wiki/File:Rosa_10_28_2023_MBA_keeper_cropped.jpg)

Rosa in 2023

Wreden has hosted annual charity livestreams to raise money for the [Monterey Bay Aquarium](/wiki/Monterey_Bay_Aquarium "Monterey Bay Aquarium") since the 20th birthday of a sea otter at the aquarium named [Rosa](/wiki/Rosa_(sea_otter) "Rosa (sea otter)"). The amount raised increased yearly, reaching over $14,000 in 2021, $100,000 in 2022, and over $300,000 for Rosa's 24th birthday in 2023.[[13]](#cite_note-13)[[14]](#cite_note-14)[[15]](#cite_note-15)

Rosa died in June 2024. Wreden held his 2024 fundraiser stream in remembrance of Rosa, which raised over $620,000 for the Monterey Bay Aquarium.[[16]](#cite_note-16) As of 2024, Wreden and his community have raised over $1,000,000 for the Monterey Bay Aquarium.[[17]](#cite_note-17) In 2025, Wreden published a parodic book titled *Doug: A DougDoug Story*; the book consists primarily of the word "Doug" repeated throughout, and all profits from book sales are dedicated to the Monterey Bay Aquarium.[[18]](#cite_note-:0-18)

### Podcasting

Main article: [Lemonade Stand (podcast)](/wiki/Lemonade_Stand_(podcast) "Lemonade Stand (podcast)")

In March of 2025, Wreden launched the *[Lemonade Stand](/wiki/Lemonade_Stand_(podcast) "Lemonade Stand (podcast)")* podcast with [Brandon Ewing](/wiki/Atrioc "Atrioc") and Aiden McCaig, focusing on business, tech, and politics.[[5]](#cite_note-Carman-5) Lemonade Stand is partnered with Vox Media as of October of 2025.[[19]](#cite_note-Vox-19)

**Douglas Scott "Doug" Wreden**[[2]](#cite_note-2) (born: January 18, 1991 (1991-01-18) [age 35]),[[3]](#cite_note-3) better known online as **DougDoug**, is an American [YouTuber](/wiki/YouTuber "YouTuber"), Twitch streamer, and author from Sacramento, California.[[1]](#cite_note-location-1) He makes comedic gaming videos that mainly revolve around him doing various unorthodox gaming challenges, as well as videos where he explains various gaming-related topics with food as analogies.

## History[]

Doug created his channel in March 2008 under the username **Gloudas**, but didn't start uploading [videos](/wiki/Video "Video") until September 2015.[[4]](#cite_note-4) His original videos were usually related to the online video game Hearthstone, but in September 2018, he changed his channel name to DougDoug and changed his content alongside it.[[5]](#cite_note-5)

Doug has since made content where he attempts to complete simple tasks in video games, such as [completing a level in Super Mario Bros.](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SDT-QbFBLa0) or [driving from one destination to another in GTA V](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XvK4py0EE5s), but in unconventional and challenging ways, such as using voice commands only to control his character or while wearing a blindfold. He also does challenges where he allows his 'Twitch Chat' (his viewers on Twitch) to play games by typing in commands and actions in the hopes of beating the game or level.

He's also gained popularity because of his '...but explained with food' series where he explains gaming-related topics but with food as elaborate analogies, although this series has stopped.[[6]](#cite_note-6) He also has a second channel called DougDougDoug, which consists of Twitch challenges that were not considered good enough for the main channel as well as other comedic videos and updates.[[7]](#cite_note-7) He would then create a new government, Fartocracy.[[8]](#cite_note-8)

On September 10, 2025, he announced that he changed his username on his social media accounts to promote "DOUG: A DougDoug Story", a supposed biography book about himself that actually contains nothing but the word "Doug" printed on every page.[[9]](#cite_note-9)

Friends til Death is a Podcast channel Doug started with [Failboat](/wiki/Failboat "Failboat") in 2022 in which one of them would play a video game until they die, when they do the podcast ends instantly.[[10]](#cite_note-10) The podcasts often last only a few seconds. Despite this the video often goes on for 10 or 20 more minutes of a black screen to make it seem like a serious and long video at first.

## Inside Jokes/Twitch chat shenanigans[]

### Rigged[]

Doug's chat often spams "RIGGED" when they lose while playing a game or lose a prediction. It originated from Doug once playing the PopCap game [Peggle](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Peggle "wikipedia:Peggle") and screaming "rigged" when he continually lost.[*[citation needed](/wiki/WT:FP "WT:FP")*]

#### Planned[]

The opposite is true for 'Planned'.[*[citation needed](/wiki/WT:FP "WT:FP")*]

### GOTTEM[]

Gottem is a joke where Doug or any character get deliberately roasted, tricked, or trolled.[*[citation needed](/wiki/WT:FP "WT:FP")*]

### Divorced Twitch Chatters[]

In Doug's video "[Can you survive in GTA 5 if all cars are invisible?](https://youtu.be/VCEQkYXNs1w)" Twitch user 'wavescape07' donated $3 to Doug with a message saying "*My wife left me and I'm in a deep depression but I'm donating the only money she let me keep hahahahahahahahaha*", Doug replied to this by saying "*If anybody else has ex wives where they wanna funnel money through me instead... I'm here for you."*

Many other donations came in jokingly stating that their wives divorced them.

### Olive Oil[]

In "The Skyrim Speedrun where you literally just get married", Doug states that he is on [Keto](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ketogenic_diet "wikipedia:Ketogenic diet") and has 'between three and four shots of olive oil, just straight olive oil' because he does not want to spend time cooking.[[13]](#cite_note-13)

In a stream, he reveals that he actually hates olive oil and just drinks it for the Keto diet.[[14]](#cite_note-14)

### Diablo the Cheater[]

In '[I let an AI rewrite my LinkedIn profile (and forced spammers to read it)](https://youtu.be/-xR3v7rx3O8)' Doug had an AI rewrite his job as a self-employed YouTuber and the AI spit out this:

"...I'm a god. I call myself Diablo the Cheater. As far as I know, I'm the only person who writes a list of cheating cheats and uses it in-game. My mod turned the game [Skyrim] into an interdimensional sex simulator (powered by a f\*cking necromancer), and I use that game on a daily basis. To date, I've cheated in thirty games. Twenty-one of them were developed by other users, and the other two were made by me...".

Doug's Twitch Chat then began to quote this.

In "[If I can't beat 10 Expert levels, Twitch Chat takes control.](https://youtu.be/iOhxpfxjYsY)" Doug mentions he had lost his Peggle world record, the record holder at the time said "Doug if by any chance you watch this... ### WHAT'S GOING ON???[]

In "The Skyrim Speedrun where you literally just get married" Doug mocked some Twitch chatters for saying "WHAT'S GOING ON" in chat, stating that he thinks he makes it pretty obvious.[[15]](#cite_note-15) People then started to say that to annoy Doug, making it almost impossible to tell if someone is joking or not when they ask what's happening now.

### Fat Albert[]

Fat Albert is a recent inside joke in the community. In '[How Twitch Chat became the world’s fastest Youtube Speedrunner](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hncs8JIN1cA)' Doug made a challenge where his chat must find a video associated with the word within 10 rounds. in the first round, Twitch Chat saw a movie of [Fat Albert](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fat_Albert_(film) "wikipedia:Fat Albert (film)") in the YouTube homepage, where 19% of Doug's chat clicked on Fat Albert, later more and more. In [I let Twitch Chat decorate my new room](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hZms3n_qvc0). Twitch user 'griff\_cymru' mentioned that Doug should buy a Fat Albert DVD, later chat donated and begged Doug to buy Fat Albert posters to cover the wall.

### Twitch chat crashes the oxygen stock[]

In "[I randomized Zelda, then hosted the most chaotic race ever](https://youtu.be/f80zrMxxGfU?t=803)" Doug decided to do oxygen standard base for his currency. then Doug made a channel point reward for that, then Doug's Twitch Chat went crazy and convert their channel point to oxygen. Doug later reopened the channel point reward and Twitch Chat went crazy and converted their channel points to oxygen, Doug comedically showed that the oxygen stock is crashing and stated that it's Twitch Chats fault for crashing the oxygen stock.

### Barnfinders[]

Barnfinders is a more niche part of Doug's memes. Barnfinders is a game that twitch chat repeatedly spammed Doug to play, to the point of Doug going insane. In "[The Legend of Barn Finders: A Historical Documentary](https://youtu.be/PiuBpuFtXRY)" this entire event is summarised. The endless nagging on Doug to play barnfinders made him finally give in, and the experience was in his own words "Incredible. Is there anything this game can't do?" despite his previous statement that Barnfinders "very well may be the worst game that exists".

### Parkzer[]

Parkzer is \*not\* a lawyer or police officer, but is one of DougDoug's many friends. Parkzer is known as a incredibly dense to media and internet culture in the DougDoug lore, Parkzer first appeared in "[I brought a Real Lawyer to teach me Gun Safety"](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8TBQGci3zP8). Later, Parkzer appeared in more videos (as a voice) where he is sometime clueless about internet culture and what Doug meant.

Parkzer has his own [website.](https://parkzer.com/)

### 1751[]

One and a half hours into [Rosa's 23rd birthday stream](https://youtu.be/Zcccw_WLEOg) DougDoug challenged twitch chat to complete Sea Otter themed quizzes on Sporcle via clickmaps, one of these quizzes was a fill in the blank quiz, and one of the options was "1751". Twitch chat kept on yelling the answer 1751 even if it didn't fit and said phrases like "This is literally 1751." Ever since then 1751 has been a replacement for 1984 and is used by twitch chat whenever DougDoug bans a word/phrase from chat.[[16]](#cite_note-16)

Started as a joke Twitch Chat spammed during the Bunny Suit stream, but then they vandalized the Kingdom Hearts wiki, and later made a page for Dingus on the Kingdom Hearts Fanon Wiki.[[17]](#cite_note-17)

### Pope[]

In DougDoug's first video of the "AI Invasion" series, Twitch Chat first took control of Vatican City, meaning the Pope belonged to them.[[18]](#cite_note-18) But because of unfortunate events, they fled the kingdom and disappeared into the forest. Because of that, and in every other video in the series, Twitch Chat tried to elect a new Pope whenever they could.

### Poob/Ploob[]

A member of Doug’s chat in "[Can you bike down GTA's Mountain using ONLY your voice?](https://youtu.be/UNSPeyf_DN0?si=6SrFxEgyQSwBr6BY)" which he suggests one of the voice controls should be “poob”, Doug thinks it’s a meaningless phrase (the chatter stated later on that it was a word he and his siblings made up) but Doug googles it anyways, he finds out it is the name of a Star Wars: Ewoks character. And watches "[Ploob or poob: Star Wars ewoks](https://youtu.be/iuL3zQQT0ac?si=OtH5UHA4pAmYq4fF)". One chatter points out that it sounds like he said “Ploob” and not “poob”, Doug rewatches and asserts that it is poob. They later held a vote to see which it was, and they decided that it was Ploob. The creator of the show, Paul Dini, also said that it was Ploob.[[19]](#cite_note-19)

The words “poob” and “ploob” are both now banned in Doug’s chat, presumably because he found the jokes to be repetitive and unfunny.[*[citation needed](/wiki/WT:FP "WT:FP")*] In 2023 he read a twitch chat message after talking about Pumbaa from The Lion King, someone in chat replied to that and said “it’s pronounced Ploomba.” Doug said that it was “the first funny Ploob joke in years.”[*[citation needed](/wiki/WT:FP "WT:FP")*]

### **The Doughole DougDoug wiki page**[]

[The Doughole](https://dougdoug.fandom.com/wiki/The_Doughole) is a fanwiki for ddcu made from dougdoug fans. The wiki page for DougDoug is filled with some accurate information of his past history but also multitude of jokes. the page is also filled with fan stories of dougdoug lives and DDCU lore, later [dougdoug react](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dX-6F4Xw4RA) to this wiki reading it and saying citation needed when a wrong information comes.

### BALD[]

“BALD” is a recurring joke in Twitch Chat, spammed whenever Doug’s hairline is mentioned. The joke began during the *Very Chill Hearthstone Stream[*[citation needed](/wiki/WT:FP "WT:FP")*]* , where Doug’s headphones pushed his hair back, creating the appearance of a bald spot. Though he initially found it amusing and encouraged the chat, Doug has since grown tired of the joke’s persistence.

His friends also jokes about doug hairline.

## Trivia[]

* His brother, Davey Wreden, has created or co-created games such as [The Stanley Parable](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Stanley_Parable "wikipedia:The Stanley Parable") and [The Beginner's Guide](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Beginner%27s_Guide "wikipedia:The Beginner's Guide").[[21]](#cite_note-21) He also has a younger sister named Julia.[[22]](#cite_note-22)

  + Also worked as a software engineer for EA during 2014 - 2015.[[23]](#cite_note-:0-23)
* He has a friend (and former roommate) named Jack, a lawyer who occasionally helps Doug tackle any political and lawful dilemmas.[[24]](#cite_note-24)[[25]](#cite_note-25)

* Doug does not like chocolate.[[30]](#cite_note-30)
* On May 2023, he did a stream where he used ChatGPT to play the 1996 children's adventure game *[Pajama Sam: No Need to Hide When It's Dark Outside](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pajama_Sam:_No_Need_to_Hide_When_It%27s_Dark_Outside "wikipedia:Pajama Sam: No Need to Hide When It's Dark Outside")*,[[31]](#cite_note-31) and later made a highlight video out of it on June 27.[[32]](#cite_note-32) Viewers called it a movie due to its length (taking around 2 hours to watch), so Doug decided to submit [a non-copyrighted version of the whole video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HuXBStGS3pY) to the [Sundance Film Festival](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sundance_Film_Festival "wikipedia:Sundance Film Festival"). * He raised $302,000 for Rosa the Otter's 2023 birthday stream.[[36]](#cite_note-36)

[[1]](#cite_note-:4-1)**[DougDoug](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Terrorism)**[†](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dagger_(mark))[[2]](#cite_note-2) (Born *Douglas Scott Wreden* *on [January 18th, 1991](https://pastdaily.com/2022/01/18/january-18-1991-operation-desert-storm-skies-baghdad-scuds-tel-aviv/#:~:text=January%2018%2C%201991%20%E2%80%93%20With%20news,which%20began%20the%20previous%20night.)*[Citation needed]) (not to be confused with [DougDougAI](/wiki/DougDougAI "DougDougAI")) [wa](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Past_tense)[s](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Death) [a](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/A) [depressed](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Depression) [*best-selling* author](/wiki/DOUG:_A_DougDoug_Story "DOUG: A DougDoug Story"), [rig lord](/wiki/Rig_Lord_Order "Rig Lord Order"), [mug salesman](https://dougdoug.shop/en-usd/products/the-dougdoug-mugmug), [bald](/wiki/Baldness "Baldness") [bell pepper](https://amzn.to/48fM25j), [McNugget](/wiki/Chicken_McNuggets "Chicken McNuggets") [addict](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Addiction)[[3]](#cite_note-:3-3), fictional side character, [musician](/wiki/Death_Roads "Death Roads"), stock photo chef model[[1]](#cite_note-:4-1), chef who doesn't actually know how to cook, C-tier Twitch streamer[[4]](#cite_note-4), and [Semi-Retired](/wiki/Doug%27s_Retirement "Doug's Retirement")[[5]](#cite_note-5) Youtuber[[Notes 1]](#cite_note-:1-6)[[6]](#cite_note-7). He is the Main Antagonist of the [DDCU](/wiki/DDCU_(DougDoug_Cinematic_Universe) "DDCU (DougDoug Cinematic Universe)")

**DougDoug** was primarily known for being [the](/wiki/The "The") [*best-selling*](/wiki/DOUG:_A_DougDoug_Story "DOUG: A DougDoug Story"), *[award](/wiki/Dougies "Dougies")-winning*[[Notes 1]](#cite_note-:1-6) [author](/wiki/DOUG:_A_DougDoug_Story "DOUG: A DougDoug Story") of [DOUG: A DougDoug Story](/wiki/DOUG:_A_DougDoug_Story "DOUG: A DougDoug Story") and is [the](/wiki/The "The")[[7]](#cite_note-8) feature of several biographies, including *Douglass Scott Wreden Biography 2025*, *Douglass Scott Wreden: The [Shit King](/wiki/Shit_King "Shit King")*, and *Beyond the [DougDoug Multiverse](/wiki/DDCU_(DougDoug_Cinematic_Universe) "DDCU (DougDoug Cinematic Universe)").*

**DougDoug** [had](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Past_tense) [therapy](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Therapy) on [Wednesdays](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wednesday)[[8]](#cite_note-9)

**DougDoug** had also known, to a lesser degree, to occasionally livestream on *[Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/)*. He frequently employs his [Twitch Chatters](/wiki/Twitch_Chat "Twitch Chat"), who he holds captive in his basement, in order to "*Solve problems that no one has*". These streams are very often Rigged, likely due to his extreme case of main character syndrome and objectification toward Twitch Chat and [Chair](/wiki/Chair "Chair").

It is a well known fact that he died of being retired on December 19th, 2025.

**DougDoug** has a [brother](/wiki/Davey_Wreden "Davey Wreden"), [the](/wiki/The "The") popular [video game](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Video_game) developer [*Davey Wreden*](/wiki/Davey_Wreden "Davey Wreden"), who is much better at *[2D platformers](/wiki/2D_Platformer_Game "2D Platformer Game")* than Doug ever will be.[[9]](#cite_note-10) Doug also has a sister who he doesn't like.

**DougDoug's** [biggest fans](/wiki/The_Believers "The Believers") are known as [The Believers](/wiki/The_Believers "The Believers"), a group of (clinically insane) bald chatters who vote towards Douglas's advantage on [Channel Point Predictions](/wiki/Balds "Balds"), however unlike other cults, members typically only stay members a *matter of hours* due to [the](/wiki/The "The") constant [failures](/wiki/Failboat "Failboat") of **DougDoug**. The Believers are poor because they always gamble against Doug losing. Their "wins" mainly stem from Doug [rigging](/wiki/Rigged "Rigged") the outcome.

**DougDoug's** biggest haters are [the](/wiki/The "The") Doubters and [r/wehatedougdoug](/wiki/R/wehatedougdoug "R/wehatedougdoug"), a group of chatters and redditors, respectively, who see through Doug's [bald](/wiki/Baldness "Baldness")-faced lies and point out his shortcomings, such as how bad he is at [2D Platformers](/wiki/2D_Platformers "2D Platformers"). The Doubters are rich because they always gamble against Doug winning.

**DougDoug** was directly responsible for many historical events, including [the](/wiki/The "The") [10/21 Incident](/wiki/10/21_Incident "10/21 Incident"), [the January 16 massacre](/wiki/January_16_massacre "January 16 massacre"), [the 9/1 Incident](/wiki/9/1_Incident "9/1 Incident"), [07/10 Incident](/wiki/07/10_Incident "07/10 Incident"), [10/23 Kahoot Purges](/wiki/10/23_Kahoot_Purges "10/23 Kahoot Purges"), and more. (See also <#Controversies>)

## Character History[]

### Ancestry[]

Doug's great grandfather was the best baker in all of *Slutgart*, *Germany*. Unfortunately, *Adolf Hitler* grew envious of his baking skills, having failed to make it into baking college, and conscripted him into the army and sent him off to die in *Stalingrad*. This was a national tragedy that single handedly turned the tide of the war.[[1]](#cite_note-:4-1)

Whether Doug's Austrian great Grandfather was on his maternal or paternal side is unknown. What is known is his paternal side of the family were *Sorghum* farmers living in Southwest *Texas*[[10]](#cite_note-11), before Doug's father *Don Wreden*[[11]](#cite_note-12) broke the chain by going to Medical School and became a doctor[[12]](#cite_note-13), which caused a lot of drama in the family.

Douglass had *German*/*Soviet* roots,[[13]](#cite_note-14) when asked about why exactly his grandpa moved to the *[United States](/wiki/United_States_AI_Invasion "United States AI Invasion")* instead of stay in *Germany*, Doug said the answer was "*really fucked up*", and refused to elaborate further.[[14]](#cite_note-15) It is semi-implied that he fled the country around [World War II](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/World_War_II).

Doug's father then moved to [Sacramento, California](/wiki/Sacramento "Sacramento") where he met Doug's mother,[[15]](#cite_note-16) who is also a Doctor [[16]](#cite_note-17). They then had 3 children together *Douglas Wreden* (DougDoug); [*Davey Wreden*](/wiki/Davey_Wreden "Davey Wreden")*;* and *Doug's sister,* *Julia*. [[17]](#cite_note-18)

The farm where Doug's dad is from was forcibly rented out to another family of farmers who now grow *cotton* on it. He had only recently remembered his family still technically owns land in Texas, and has considered kicking [*Twitch Chat*](/wiki/Twitch_Chat "Twitch Chat") out of his basement and giving them some of his as a part of his [*Will and Testament*](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Will_and_testament) like a bald, gay, homosexual virgin[[Notes 2]](#cite_note-19).

### Childhood[]

**DougDoug** was born in *[Sacramento](/wiki/Sacramento "Sacramento")*, *California.*

DougDoug has allegedly loved playing "video" games ever since he was a "young" child. One of the video games he played, which also happens to be his favourite video game of all time[[18]](#cite_note-20), was [Pajama Sam: No Need To Hide When It's Dark Outside](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pajama_Sam:_No_Need_to_Hide_When_It%27s_Dark_Outside) when he was a child, finally finishing the game by the time he graduated high school. DougDoug especially loved [platformers](/wiki/2D_Platformer_Game "2D Platformer Game") such as Mario and Donkey Kong, despite his abhorrent skill at them. DougDoug played every Pokémon game released and [has stated his favourite pokemon is cucumber man](https://youtu.be/6lclJrE3_Es?t=13763), he has also stated that his favorite Pokemon is Raichu when talking to the chatter Magma\_OnTwitch.

DougDoug also had a pet cat named [Parkzer](/wiki/Parkzer_(Cat) "Parkzer (Cat)") during his early years of childhood who has become an integral part of both his private life and streaming presence.

On his first day of school, DougDoug peed his pants, and then all his classmates started laughing hysterically. A girl named Katie laughed the loudest, saying "*Pee Pants Doug!*". At that moment, he changed from Douglass, to Pee Pants Doug. Doug then dedicated his life to getting good at holding his piss in so that he could one day not pee in front of Katie, to finally show her that he was no longer "*Pee Pants Doug*".[[19]](#cite_note-:10-21) He still hasn't achieved this, although he was close to not peeing during the Rosa streams.

In [school](/wiki/Honorable_Douglas_Academy "Honorable Douglas Academy"), Doug was unpopular due to him chewing on pencils and desks. When his teacher tired of this and tried to get him to stop, Doug took his classmates hostage[[20]](#cite_note-22), and it took the [police](/wiki/Mods "Mods") 2 weeks to get Doug to release the hostages due to his impossible demands, including a [wig that fits his head](/wiki/Baldness "Baldness"), 10,000 copies of Half-Life 2 for the Xbox, and a human head.

#### The Shit King[]

When DougDoug was 7 years old during a night when his [family](/wiki/Davey_Wreden "Davey Wreden") was eating dinner he came out of the bathroom holding his own shit in both hands. DougDoug yelled "I am the [Shit King](/wiki/Shit_King "Shit King")! I am the [king of shit](/wiki/Shit_King "Shit King")! I can [eat shit](/wiki/Shit_King "Shit King") for days!" as he [ate his own shit](/wiki/Shit_King "Shit King"). When he finished he yelled "It tastes so [good](/wiki/Shit_King "Shit King"). I'll eat it forever because I am the king of poop!"[[21]](#cite_note-23).

[**DougDoug's**](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Psychopathy) [shit eating](/wiki/Shit_King "Shit King") behavior became a habit. He would wear a paper crown as he ate his own shit. He forced his brother [Davey Wreden](/wiki/Davey_Wreden "Davey Wreden") to run around with a shit-covered flag inscribed "[Shit King](/wiki/Shit_King "Shit King")".

Additionally, DougDoug once shit his pants upon witnessing the **Dark Faerie** Jhudora in Neopets as an eleven year old.[[22]](#cite_note-24)

#### The Sheep King[]

As revealed by his older brother, Davey, Doug once authored a presentation about why a human and a [sheep kissing](/wiki/Sheep_Kissing "Sheep Kissing") is so beautiful, containing many slides of details about sheep kissing. He showed this off at a talent show at a camp at the dismay of the camp counselors. It concerned the camp counselors and his family very deeply, eventually developing into a running joke amongst his family. He later insisted on traveling to a petting zoo, rather than a normal zoo, and had [uncomfortable interactions with a sheep](/wiki/Sheep_Kissing "Sheep Kissing") before the family was kicked out. He has also dressed as a sheep for *Halloween.*

### University and Fraternity[]

DougDoug went to *UC Berkley* for *Computer Science* and to *play quidditch*. DougDoug's first programming teacher was *Brian Harvey*, who taught him the [Scheme programming language](https://www.wordnik.com/words/dogshit) which is from the family of the [Lisp programming languages](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lisp_(programming_language)). He joined the Nu chapter of the fraternity [Tau Kappa Epsilon](Https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tau%20Kappa%20+Epsilon) in 2010[[23]](#cite_note-25) where he became a Hypophetes[[24]](#cite_note-26), whose responsibility it is to source large shipments [Jenkem](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jenkem) for himself and his brethren to indulge in on a daily basis. He was ultimately banned from the chapter in 2013[[25]](#cite_note-27) following the tragic Egg Day incident of 1243 B.C.[[Notes 3]](#cite_note-:2-28) the cavemen wept that day. Doug spent most of his time playing quidditch[[26]](#cite_note-29), which he is a founding member of, although he had to quit to focus on his studies as he had got way too into the sport and spent all his time flying on his broom.

### Modern[]

Doug created his channel in March 2008 under the username *Gloudas*[[Notes 4]](#cite_note-30), but didn't start uploading videos until September 2015.[[27]](#cite_note-31) His original videos were usually related to the online video game Hearthstone, but in September 2018, he proceeded to change his [channel name](/wiki/DougDoug%27s_Channels "DougDoug's Channels") to [DougDoug](https://www.youtube.com/@DougDoug) and changed his content alongside it.

 [![The logo DougDoug used when he first became DougDoug.](data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIABAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAEALAAAAAABAAEAQAICTAEAOw%3D%3D)](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/dougdoug/images/3/3a/OldLogo.jpg/revision/latest?cb=20240401014344) 

The logo DougDoug used when he first became DougDoug.

 

Doug had since made content where he attempts[[Notes 5]](#cite_note-32) to complete simple tasks in [video games](/wiki/Category:Games "Category:Games"), such as completing a level in Super Mario Bros. or driving from one destination to another in GTA V, but in unconventional and challenging ways, such as using voice commands only to control his character or while wearing a blindfold. He was horrible at video games, even moreso at [2D platformers](/wiki/2D_Platformer_Game "2D Platformer Game"), so he hadn't been able to complete any challenge.

Doug has made it clear on multiple occasions that he hates poor people, and thinks they matter less than rich people, because he can't milk any money out of them.

##### The Basement[]

For years Doug has been abducting people and locking them in his basement, where they are forced to watch his stream and slave away in the Pog factory Dface mine, and Mugmug factory. Most of dougs views and stream engagement come from these hostages. Doug pays his workers a meager salary which he then takes back by charging them for oxygen. All government inspectors that have looked into Doug's basement operation were subsequently murdered by Doug to cover up his crimes, everyone who look into the murders of these inspectors were also murdered by Doug, and the same for everyone who looked into their murders and so on.



## Sexuality and Sex life[]

Doug Is confirmed to be Virgin; this is most likely due to his baldness and lack 2d platformer skills making him unattractive to everyone of all possible genders and sexual orientations. Doug claims to "have a girlfriend" but since she has never been seen on stream it can be assumed to be a fabrication of Doug's.

##### Bestiality[]

Doug has been shown to be sexually attracted to a wide variety of animals ranging from Mammals to invertebrates. The earliest known instance of these desires was The SheepKing Incident, where during a talent show at summer camp Doug went to as a child, Doug gave a presentation on the beauty of human and sheep kissing, Doug would continue to show signs of an attraction to sheep throughout his childhood and teenage years. During a Silksong stream Doug repeatedly tried to deny his clear attraction to Hornet and desire for spiders. Doug is also fond of watch bird mating videos and has forced chat to watch them much to their horror, and is on record complaining about the lack of Eel mating videos out there. He is ether straight, or not straight.
